about.title: About My Resources
about.description: My Resources is an open-source tool for tracking and organizing your online purchases across multiple platforms, with automatic currency conversion and cost calculation.
about.feature1: Aggregate purchases from multiple providers (Allegro, Amazon, AliExpress, Temu)
about.feature2: Calculate costs for selected purchases with per-currency breakdown
about.feature3: Automatic currency conversion with historical exchange rates
about.feature4: Organize with custom tag groups and values
about.feature5: Group related purchases into compound items
about.feature6: Export and import your data freely
about.feature9: All data stored locally in your browser — no server required
about.openSourceDescription: This project is open source and available on GitHub.
about.supportDescription: If you find this project useful, consider supporting its development.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This page explains how My Resources and the My Purchases Collector Chrome extension handle your data.
privacy.localDataDescription: All your purchase data, tags, settings, and credentials are stored locally in your browser using IndexedDB and localStorage. No data is sent to any server owned by us.
privacy.providersDescription: When you sync with providers like Allegro or eBay, your data is exchanged directly between your browser and the provider's API. We do not intermediate or store this data.
privacy.analyticsDescription: We may use anonymous analytics to understand how the application is used. No personal data or purchase information is included in analytics.
privacy.cookiesDescription: My Resources uses browser localStorage to save your language preference and invitation settings. IndexedDB is used for purchase data. No tracking cookies are used.
privacy.chromeExtensionIntro: The My Purchases Collector Chrome extension collects order data from AliExpress. It operates exclusively on aliexpress.com pages and only processes order-related API responses. The complete source code is available at github.com/my-purchases/extensions.
privacy.chromeExtensionDataCollectionDescription: The extension captures the following order data from AliExpress API responses: order ID, product ID, SKU ID, product title, price and currency, quantity, order date, order status, store name, product URL, store page URL, product image URL, and SKU attributes (e.g. color, size, shipping origin). Each record also includes a timestamp of when it was captured. The extension does not collect any personal identity information — no names, email addresses, phone numbers, payment details, shipping addresses, authentication tokens, or browser cookies.
privacy.chromeExtensionCollectionMethodDescripti: The extension uses a content script running in the page context to intercept API responses that AliExpress already sends to your browser. It monitors three channels: fetch requests, XMLHttpRequest responses, and JSONP callbacks — all limited to AliExpress order API endpoints. No additional network requests are made to AliExpress or any other server. The extension only reads responses — it never modifies requests or sends data anywhere. The optional "Collect All" feature automates scrolling and clicking the "load more" button on the order page to capture your complete order history.
privacy.chromeExtensionStorageDescription: All collected data is stored locally in your browser using chrome.storage.local. The extension does not use chrome.storage.sync, so no data is synced across devices via Google's servers. No other storage mechanisms are used — no localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, or cookies. Data persists between browser sessions but is automatically removed by Chrome when the extension is uninstalled.
privacy.chromeExtensionDataTransmissionDescripti: The extension makes zero outbound network requests. No data is ever transmitted to any external server, cloud service, API, or third party. All internal communication happens between the extension's components using Chrome extension messaging APIs (chrome.runtime.sendMessage, chrome.tabs.sendMessage) and window.postMessage within the same page.
privacy.chromeExtensionPermissionsDescription: Storage — saves collected orders and collection status locally using chrome.storage.local. Unlimited Storage — removes the default 10 MB quota to accommodate large order histories. Tabs — required for the auto-collect feature to find your AliExpress order tab (chrome.tabs.query), send start/stop commands to the content script (chrome.tabs.sendMessage), and open the AliExpress orders page from the popup (chrome.tabs.create). Host access (aliexpress.com) — allows content scripts to run on AliExpress pages and intercept order API responses. No other permissions are requested.
privacy.chromeExtensionExportDescription: You can export your orders to CSV, JSON, HTML, or copy them to your clipboard. All exports are user-initiated — no data is exported automatically. Files are generated locally in your browser and downloaded to your device. The JSON format is compatible with the My Purchases web application, but importing requires a manual action on your part. Individual orders can be excluded from exports using the ignore flag.
privacy.chromeExtensionRetentionDescription: Collected data is retained until you delete it — there is no automatic expiration. You can delete all orders at once via the trash icon in the popup (requires confirmation), or remove individual orders. When the extension is uninstalled, Chrome automatically removes all stored data. When new orders are captured, duplicates are merged automatically — existing orders with the same ID are updated with the latest data.
privacy.chromeExtensionThirdPartyDescription: The extension's only runtime dependencies are React, ReactDOM, and lucide-react (icon library). All three are open-source, client-side rendering libraries that make no network requests and collect no data.
privacy.chromeExtensionNoTrackingDescription: The extension contains no analytics, telemetry, error reporting, tracking pixels, or usage statistics of any kind. It does not collect device identifiers, browser fingerprints, or IP addresses.
privacy.contactDescription: For questions about this privacy policy, please open an issue on our GitHub repository.

extension.title: My Purchases Collector
extension.subtitle: Chrome Extension
extension.description: Automatically collect and export your AliExpress orders. No manual copy-pasting — just browse your orders and the extension captures everything.
extension.step1Description: Go to your AliExpress order history page. The extension automatically detects and captures order data from the page.
extension.step2Description: Click "Collect All" in the extension popup to automatically scroll through and load all your orders.
extension.step3Description: Export to CSV, JSON, HTML, or copy directly to clipboard for Google Sheets. Import into My Resources web app.
extension.featureAutoCapture: Automatic API interception — no scraping, no manual work
extension.featureCollectAll: One-click "Collect All" to load your entire order history
extension.featureExportFormats: Export to CSV, JSON, HTML, or clipboard
extension.featureCompatible: Compatible with My Resources web app import
extension.featurePrivacy: All data stays in your browser — zero tracking
extension.privacyDescription: The extension stores all data locally in your browser. No data is sent to any server. No analytics or tracking. Read the full

currency.title: Currency
currency.setupDescription: Choose your preferred currency for price conversion. Purchases in other currencies will be automatically converted using historical exchange rates.
currency.settingsDescription: Set your preferred currency to automatically convert prices from different currencies using historical exchange rates.
currency.convertingDescription: Fetching exchange rates and converting prices to {{currency}}...
currency.conversionCompleteDescription: All prices have been converted to {{currency}}.
